description_long: This object is a long, precision firearm with a matte metallic barrel and a robust, tactical stock. It features a prominent telescopic sight mounted on top, suggesting it is designed for long-range accuracy. The stock is adjustable and includes a cheek rest and a buttpad, with a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The barrel is slender and extended, with a muzzle brake at the tip, and the receiver area is detailed with a visible bolt handle. The trigger guard is squared and reinforced, providing protection and stability for the trigger mechanism. The overall coloration is a mix of olive drab, black, and metallic gray, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A long, tactical shotgun with a telescopic sight, adjustable stock, and extended barrel, finished in olive drab and black. It features a pistol grip, squared trigger guard, and a robust, precision-oriented design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel, muzzle brake, and the alignment of the telescopic sight above the receiver.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the barrel, the mounted scope, adjustable stock, and pistol grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the buttpad, cheek rest, and the back of the telescopic sight, with the bolt handle visible on the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the same features as view 1, with additional detail on the stock's adjustment mechanism.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and slender with a visible muzzle brake and no ribbing or venting
attribute_stock_type: adjustable full stock with cheek rest and buttpad
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, medium-sized trigger guard with reinforced edges and a straight profile
